  "findings": [
    "Vacuum decay test failed to hold target microns, indicating a leak or moisture in the system."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate the system, pressurize with dry nitrogen to locate the leak, repair any defective braze joints, and repeat the evacuation and decay test."
  ],
  "rationale": "A system that cannot hold a vacuum under a decay test fails to meet manufacturer specifications, ACCA guidelines, and EPA 608 standards. This indicates either a physical refrigerant leak or the presence of moisture/non-condensables, which will damage the compressor and degrade system performance.",
